title: Usufruct
doc_html:
Art. 3396.8.  Usufruct

When the testament creates a usufruct and concurrence in having an independent administration is required, or when the usufruct arises by operation of law, the concurrence of the usufructuary and the naked owner is required.

Acts 2001, No. 974, §1.
